'''dafïfzhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibroglia|fibroglia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-f-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibroglia|fibroglia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dafïfzhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dæfïfzhïfth || dæfïfzhïfj || dæfïfzhïfsh || dæfïfzhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dafïffïfzhïfth || dafïffïfzhïfj || dafïffïfzhïfsh || dafïffïfzhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dafïfzhïfth || dafïfzhïfj || dafïfzhïfsh || dafïfzhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dafïffzhïffth || dafïffzhïffj || dafïffzhïffsh || dafïffzhïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dafïfzhïfïf || dafïfzhïfïf || dafïfzhïfïf || dafïfzhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || dafïfzhïfth || dafïfzhïfj || dafïfzhïfsh || dafïfzhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dafïfzhïfïfl || dafïfzhïfïfl || dafïfzhïfïfl || dafïfzhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dafïfzhïfïfïf || dafïfzhïfïfïf || dafïfzhïfïfïf || dafïfzhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || dafïfzhïfïfn || dafïfzhïfïfn || dafïfzhïfïfn || dafïfzhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dafïfzhïfïforo || dafïfzhïfïforo || dafïfzhïfïforo || dafïfzhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
